name: Drag Sort List
description: A vertically reorderable list with drag handles, keyboard reordering support, and animated position indicators for intuitive item rearrangement.

standard.description: Full-featured sortable list with drag handles, item content, and optional trailing actions — suitable for settings pages, playlist editors, and priority lists

compact.description: Minimal-height sortable rows at 36px each, optimized for dense data scenarios like column reordering panels or bulk sort interfaces

numbered.description: Sortable list with live-updating rank numbers displayed to the left of each item, ideal for leaderboards, priority queues, and ranked preference lists

visual_brief: A vertical stack of list items, each rendered as a full-width row with a 6-dot grip icon (two columns of three dots, styled in muted gray) flush to the left edge serving as the drag handle. The drag handle area is 40px wide with a subtle hover background tint. Each item row has 12px vertical padding, a 1px bottom border in border-muted color, and transitions background-color on hover to a faint surface tint. When a user initiates a drag, the grabbed item lifts above the list with an elevated box-shadow (0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)) and a slight scale transform (1.02), maintaining its full width. The original position shows a 2px-high accent-colored horizontal line spanning the full list width as a drop indicator. As the dragged item moves vertically, items below the cursor shift downward with a smooth 200ms ease transition, and the accent drop-indicator line tracks the insertion point between items. On drop, the item settles into its new position with a 150ms ease-out transition. The numbered preset prepends a 32px-wide column showing rank numbers (1, 2, 3...) in semi-bold muted text that re-index live during drag — numbers animate between positions with a counter transition. The compact preset reduces row height to 36px, uses text-sm for content, narrows the drag handle to 28px, and removes the bottom border in favor of alternating row background tints (transparent / surface-subtle). All presets show a focus-visible ring (2px accent outline, 2px offset) around the currently keyboard-focused item.

layout_hints.note: Best placed inside a d-surface card. Each SortableItem is a full-width row. The list should have a max-height with overflow-y auto for long lists.
layout_hints.drag_handle: The 6-dot grip icon MUST be the leftmost element in each row. It uses a 2×3 grid of 4px circles with 3px gaps. Color: text-muted, hover: text-default. cursor: grab, active: cursor: grabbing.
layout_hints.drop_zone: The drop indicator line is absolutely positioned between items. It spans the full width of the list container, is 2px tall, and uses the accent color with a subtle glow (box-shadow: 0 0 4px var(--d-accent)).

slots.sortable-list: The outer container for all sortable items. Renders as a vertical flex column with no gap (items are flush). Sets role='listbox' and aria-label='Reorderable list'. Manages drag state, tracks the currently dragged item index, and calculates drop position from pointer coordinates. On keyboard reorder, dispatches announcements like 'Item moved to position 3 of 7'. Has a subtle 1px border and border-radius-md when placed standalone.
slots.sortable-item: Repeating slot — one per list entry. Each item is a horizontal flex row with align-items center. Layout: [DragHandle (40px fixed) | Content (flex-1) | Actions? (auto)]. Background: transparent, hover: surface-subtle. Border-bottom: 1px solid border-muted (except last child). Padding: 12px vertical, 8px horizontal. When being dragged: position fixed, z-index 1000, width matches original, box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), transform: scale(1.02), pointer-events: none on children except the handle. When another item is being dragged over this slot, it translates Y by the height of the dragged item with a 200ms ease transition. aria-roledescription='sortable item', aria-grabbed tracks drag state.
slots.drag-handle: A 40px-wide touch target containing a 6-dot grip icon (two vertical columns of three 4px circles, spaced 3px apart, centered within the handle area). Color: text-muted by default, text-default on hover. cursor: grab (grabbing when active). The handle has a subtle rounded background on hover (4px border-radius, bg-surface-hover). On focus-visible, shows a 2px accent ring. This is the only element that initiates drag — the rest of the row does not trigger reorder on pointer down. For touch devices, the handle area expands to 48px for easier targeting.
slots.position-indicator: The horizontal drop-target line shown between items during an active drag operation. Absolutely positioned within the list container at the calculated insertion point. Width: 100%, height: 2px, background: accent color. Enhanced with a subtle glow: box-shadow 0 0 6px color-mix(in srgb, var(--d-accent) 40%, transparent). Appears with a fast 100ms fade-in. Hidden when no drag is active. In the numbered preset, the indicator also shows a small floating badge with the prospective rank number.
slots.drop-zone: An invisible overlay region calculated per item that determines which gap the pointer is closest to. Each item has a top-half and bottom-half hit zone. When the pointer enters the top half, the indicator appears above that item; bottom half places it below. The drop zone extends 8px beyond the list edges to allow inserting at the very top or bottom. Visual feedback: none (the position-indicator handles all visual cues).

announcements: Reorder cancelled, item returned to position {from}
keyboard: Tab: move focus between sortable items
Space: pick up or drop the focused item for reordering
Arrow Up: move picked-up item one position up
Arrow Down: move picked-up item one position down
Escape: cancel reorder and return item to original position
Home: move picked-up item to first position
End: move picked-up item to last position

responsive.mobile: Drag handle touch target expands to 48px width. Long-press (300ms) on the handle initiates drag to prevent accidental reorders during scroll. Drop indicator line remains 2px but gains a wider glow for visibility on small screens. Compact preset increases row height to 44px for touch accessibility. Numbered preset reduces rank number font size to text-xs.
responsive.tablet: Full drag behavior supported with touch. Drag handle is 44px. Scroll container supports momentum scrolling while drag is inactive. When a drag is active, container scroll locks to prevent conflicting gestures.
responsive.desktop: Standard mouse-based drag and drop. Drag handle shows grab cursor. Smooth item displacement animations at 200ms. Keyboard reorder fully supported with live aria announcements.

ambient.indicator-glow: box-shadow pulse on accent 1.5s ease-in-out infinite while drag active
